ResearchProjectDef.label: basic fitting technology
ResearchProjectDef.description:
Unlocks basic fitting technology.

Enables basic fitting research and batch disassembly of specialized weapons at workbenches like machining tables.

Additionally, installing fittings and manual disassembly of specialized weapons don't require technology and can be accessed by selecting a colonist and right-clicking the corresponding menu option.

ResearchProjectDef.label: advanced fitting technology
ResearchProjectDef.description:
Unlocks advanced fitting technology.

Enables targeted research at precision assembly benches.

Unlocks fitting removal functionality - access by selecting a colonist and right-clicking a firearm, or by right-clicking the colonist to open the menu.

Disassembling specialized firearms at workbenches returns some raw materials.
